line_items.description: Cold-rolled steel flat products, in coils, not clad/plated/coated, width 1,200mm, thickness 1.5mm, low-carbon steel, ASTM A1008 CS Grade B specification. Mill test reports included.

additional_context: Regular steel coil import for distribution to US manufacturers. Baosteel is a major Chinese state-owned steel enterprise. Steel import license obtained from US Commerce. Previous AD/CVD deposits made on prior shipments.
